title: macrolobium colombianum var. ocumarense
intro: Macrolobium colombianum var. ocumarense, also known as Ocumarensis, is a variety of the Macrolobium colombianum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ocumarensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe pain, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal remedies and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
